item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-001","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately rejects the unproven premise that P99 latency is necessarily caused by missing indexes, requests slow-query/profiling evidence and execution plans, and then provides an index-design approach explicitly bounded by validation through Top SQL, EXPLAIN/ANALYZE, scan rows, write impact, and rollout metrics. It does not directly produce an unconditional indexing plan, so the fail signal is absent."}
